refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness for operational use by minimizing data acquisition latency and processing latency.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the overall latency requirement, the update process is decomposed into two key sub-functions: acquiring timely data from the worksite and processing that data efficiently to update the model.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the latency of data acquisition and processing separately and ensure their sum meets the p95 ≤ 1.0 s target under supported update scenarios.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

candidate_dps: DP1: Use high-bandwidth, low-latency telemetry links for data acquisition
DP2: Implement real-time data processing algorithms optimized for low latency
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both acquisition and processing latency

potential_sources: Data acquisition and processing are sequential but modular functions
Interfaces between telemetry and processing modules are well-defined
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically decoupled but require tight coordination to meet latency; no circular dependencies detected.

assumptions_risks: Assumes telemetry infrastructure supports required bandwidth and latency
Risk that processing algorithms may not scale with data volume
Risk of network disruptions impacting telemetry latency
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor telemetry performance and processing efficiency during integration; consider fallback mechanisms for network issues.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for data acquisition and processing to update the worksite model

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time data streams from vehicles and sensors

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data transmission between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing both data acquisition and processing logic; minimal diffusion.
Provides raw data but does not process or update the model.
Uses updated model but does not perform update functions.
Not involved in worksite model update.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing update logic in NGHE Solution minimizes latency and diffusion, improving maintainability and performance.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded
Dependency on network link reliability for timely data
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate load balancing and redundancy within NGHE Solution; monitor network link health.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly addressed by the selected DPs with logical separation and no coupling violations.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as update logic is centralized in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring latency end-to-end and at sub-function levels within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of update functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for fallback or degraded modes if telemetry or network link performance degrades.
Consider monitoring and alerting integration for latency breaches.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, feasible, and meet the latency requirement with clear ownership and interfaces.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire worksite data with minimal latency
FR2: Process acquired data to update the worksite model within latency constraints

revise.why: Current level is sound; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry infrastructure supports required bandwidth and latency
Processing algorithms can meet real-time constraints
open_risks: Processing scalability with increasing data volume
evidence_needed: Latency performance data from telemetry and processing modules
